name: lecture-site-engine
description: Parser, renderer, build pipeline, and prompts for faculty study-guide sites

scripts.test: node renderer/smoke-test.mjs && node build/lib/scaffold-subject.test.mjs && node build/lib/normalize-lecture-md.test.mjs && node build/lib/lecture-routing.test.mjs && node build/lib/exam-core.test.mjs && node build/lib/quiz-stats.test.mjs && node parser/parts/mcq.test.mjs
